summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HevaPOS Table Management and ESC/POS Printer features. All 28 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI tests passed for Tables and Printers pages.
seed_data_creation: 3 tables and 2 printers already exist from seed data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Table Management and Printer APIs working correctly. Tables API supports CRUD, merge/unmerge, clear operations. Printers API supports CRUD and ESC/POS test command generation. Reservations API supports CRUD with conflict detection. Print API generates Base64-encoded ESC/POS commands for kitchen and customer receipts.

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: order_number type mismatch - was stored as string but code tried to add integer
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added type checking to handle both string and int order_number from database

bugs_fixed_during_testing.issue: Timezone-naive datetime comparison in reservation creation
bugs_fixed_during_testing.fix: Added timezone awareness to reservation time parsing to fix comparison with UTC datetime

table_management_page.table_cards: PASSED - 3 table cards displayed with correct status colors
table_management_page.add_table_dialog: PASSED - Opens with Table Number and Seating Capacity fields
table_management_page.merge_tables_mode: PASSED - Cancel and Merge buttons appear
table_management_page.new_reservation_dialog: PASSED - Opens with all required fields
